input_data.question: Classify signals by TOLS Category, and for each group, show the category name, signal count, average Bandwidth-to-Frequency Ratio, and the standard deviation of the anomaly score.

output_data.final_sql:
SELECT 
    tc.category_name,
    COUNT(s.signal_id) AS signal_count,
    AVG(s.bandwidth_mhz / NULLIF(s.frequency_mhz, 0)) AS avg_bandwidth_frequency_ratio,
    STDDEV(s.anomaly_score) AS stddev_anomaly_score
FROM alien.signals s
JOIN alien.tols_categories tc ON s.tols_category_id = tc.category_id
GROUP BY tc.category_name, tc.category_id
ORDER BY tc.category_name;
